/mingw64/bin/c++.exe -Wl,--enable-auto-import -mwindows -static CMakeFiles/rpfm_player.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rpfm_player.dir/src/rpfm_hid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rpfm_player.dir/src/ay8910_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rpfm_player.dir/src/core/vgm_player_ui.cpp.o -o /d/working/vscode-projects/YM2163-Midi/RPFM/RPFM_Player/bin/rpfm_player.exe -Wl,--out-implib,librpfm_player.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  libimgui_lib.a -ld3d11 -ldxgi -ld3dcompiler -ldwmapi -lsetupapi -lhid -lws2_32 -lgdi32 -luser32 -lwinmm -lz
